testsuite.name: org.demo.spock.DownloadSupportSpec

testcase.name: should be able to use download methods

testsuite.system-out:
> < > ____ _ _ < > / ___|_ __ __ _(_) |___ < > | | _| '__/ _` | | / __| < > | |_| | | | (_| | | \__ \ < > \____|_| \__,_|_|_|___/ < > https://grails.org < > <
